page.title: Advanced Collocation And Lexical Choice
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Collocation And Lexical Choice - C2 collocations for precise academic and professional phrasing.
page.subtitle_text: C2 collocations for precise academic and professional phrasing.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Advanced collocation and lexical choice: compact anchors for choosing precise verb-noun and adjective-noun combinations.","rules":[{"label":"Verb-noun collocations","text":"Use combinations such as pose a challenge, set a precedent, and draw a distinction when the noun expects a specific verb.","example":"This decision poses a significant challenge."},{"label":"Lexical precision","text":"Choose words that match the strength and register of the claim.","example":"The report identifies a substantial gap in provision."},{"label":"Formal register","text":"Prefer stable academic collocations over literal word-for-word alternatives.","example":"The case raises important questions about accountability."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the English Sentence Builder C2 lesson on advanced collocation and lexical choice.
